steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: In “of a good height, as could be seen even from the seated figure,” the author describes Mr. French's stature as something observable and substantial despite his being seated. The word good signals something notable or considerable in amount.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the correct choice
steps.content: Considerable means notable or substantial in amount—exactly what “a good height” conveys in this context. The other three (well-behaved, capable, reliable) describe behavior, ability, or dependability, none of which apply to describing physical dimensions. That matches choice B — B is correct.
